title: Medical masks and respirators: Contact us - Canada.ca
content:
## Medical masks and respirators: Contact us
- Information for manufacturers
- Information for users
- Health Canada’s role
- Report a problem or concern
If you have questions about masks or respirators, contact us by:
- Email: meddevices-instrumentsmed@hc-sc.gc.ca
If you have questions about medical device establishment licences, contact us by:
- Telephone: 613-957-7285
- Teletypewriter: 1-800-465-7735 (Service Canada)
- Email: mdel.questions.leim@hc-sc.gc.ca
